gradients.text_gradient: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-400 via-purple-400 to-pink-400

hero.structure: Split layout. Left: Headline + CTA. Right: ElevenLabs Widget Container.
hero.visuals: Background should have a subtle 'Voice Wave' animation or gradient glow.
hero.widget_placeholder: A glassmorphic container on the right with 'Talk to Emma' header. This is where the ElevenLabs widget will be embedded.

problem_section.title: Missed calls cost more than you think
problem_section.style: Dark, moody. Use the 'Empty Office' image with a heavy dark overlay to symbolize lost opportunity.
problem_section.layout: 3-column grid of pain points (Revenue Leak, Lost Momentum, Reactive Responses).

features_bento.style: Bento Grid layout. Cards should be 'Glassmorphic' on top of the dark background.

voice_cloning.title: Sound like you
voice_cloning.visuals: Use the 'Neon Streaks' image as a background for a 'Voice Waveform' visualization.
voice_cloning.interaction: A 'Play' button that simulates hearing a cloned voice.

comparison.title: One system, not five tools
comparison.style: Comparison table or side-by-side list. Highlight 'HeyEmma' in Cyan/Purple vs 'Others' in Gray.

cta_footer.title: Try it risk-free for 14 days
cta_footer.style: Centered, high-impact. Large button with 'glow' effect.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install dependencies: `npm install framer-motion lucide-react @studio-freight/lenis clsx tailwind-merge`
2. Configure Tailwind: Add the custom colors and fonts to `tailwind.config.js`.
3. Create a `Layout` component that wraps the page with `Lenis` smooth scroll.
4. Build the `Hero` section first. Ensure the ElevenLabs widget container is positioned correctly on the right.
5. Use `framer-motion` for all entrance animations (fade-in up).
6. Ensure the 'Dark Mode' is permanent. Do not implement a light mode toggle.
7. Use the provided image URLs for backgrounds and context.
8. For the 'ElevenLabs Widget', create a `div` with id='elevenlabs-widget' and a placeholder visual until the actual script is added.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx`
